sentences.arabic: الرَّحْمَةُ صِفَةٌ يُحِبُّهَا اللَّهُ فِي عِبَادِهِ.
sentences.translation: Milost je osobina koju Allah voli u Svojim robovima.
sentences.translationEn: Mercy is a quality that Allah loves in His servants.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ النَّبِيُّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ: «الرَّاحِمُونَ يَرْحَمُهُمُ الرَّحْمَنُ، ارْحَمُوا مَنْ فِي الْأَرْضِ يَرْحَمْكُمْ مَنْ فِي السَّمَاءِ» [رَوَاهُ أَبُو دَاوُدَ وَصَحَّحَهُ الْأَلْبَانِيُّ].
sentences.translation: Poslanik, sallallahu alejhi ve sellem, rekao je: 'Milostivima se miluje Milostivi — milujte one na Zemlji, milovaće vas Onaj na Nebesima.'
sentences.translationEn: The Prophet, peace be upon him, said: 'The merciful are shown mercy by the Most Merciful — show mercy to those on earth and the One in the heavens will show mercy to you.'

sentences.arabic: وَكَانَ النَّبِيُّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ رَحِيمًا بِأَهْلِهِ وَأَصْحَابِهِ وَحَتَّى بِالْأَطْفَالِ وَالْحَيَوَانَاتِ.
sentences.translation: [Bilježi Ebu Davud, vjerodostojnim ga ocijenio Albani] Poslanik je bio milostiv prema svojoj porodici, ashabima, pa čak i prema djeci i životinjama.
sentences.translationEn: [Narrated by Abu Dawud, authenticated by al-Albani] The Prophet was merciful to his family, his companions, and even to children and animals.

sentences.arabic: فَالرَّحْمَةُ لَيْسَتْ ضَعْفًا، بَلْ هِيَ قُوَّةُ الْقَلْبِ وَدَلِيلُ الْإِيمَانِ الصَّادِقِ.
sentences.translation: Milost nije slabost, već je to snaga srca i dokaz iskrenog imana.
sentences.translationEn: Mercy is not weakness; rather it is the strength of the heart and evidence of sincere faith.
